title: eriogonum latifolium
intro: Eriogonum latifolium, also known as Bristlecone Sage or Broad-leaved Buckwheat, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Polygonaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum latifolium include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat wounds, burns, and skin conditions.
